notes: AllocateSmartly Bold Asset Allocation (Keller BAA-G12, SSRN 4166845 + TuringTrader Keller_BAA_v2). Canary momentum decides risk-on/risk-off; risk-on rotates into top-N of the offensive G12 universe by 13612W momentum; risk-off holds top defensive proxies. Cross-sectional rotation BASKET, D1-native, monthly rebalance gated by broker-time month change (MN1 untestable in the .DWX tester per build rule #10 -> ~21-bar/252-day D1 proxy for the 1/3/6/12-month 13612W lookbacks). All momentum computed in-EA from .DWX D1 closes via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory. No ML, no external feed.

PORT (ETFs are NOT tradeable on DWX). Offensive G12 (SPY,QQQ,IWM,VGK,EWJ,VWO,VNQ,DBC,GLD,TLT,HYG,LQD) ported to 12 DWX proxies: SPY->SP500.DWX, QQQ->NDX.DWX, IWM->WS30.DWX (no Russell CFD, nearest US large-cap), VGK->GDAXI.DWX (EU equity), EWJ->UK100.DWX (intl equity proxy; no JP225 in matrix -- FLAGGED), VWO->AUDUSD.DWX (EM/risk-on FX proxy -- FLAGGED, no EM-equity CFD), VNQ->XAGUSD.DWX (real-asset proxy -- FLAGGED, no REIT CFD), DBC->XTIUSD.DWX (broad commodity via oil), GLD->XAUUSD.DWX (gold, exact-class), TLT->XNGUSD.DWX (no DWX long-bond CFD -- FLAGGED, slot kept as a non-equity diversifier), HYG->EURUSD.DWX (credit/USD-risk FX proxy -- FLAGGED, no HY-bond CFD), LQD->USDJPY.DWX (IG-credit/risk-off FX proxy -- FLAGGED, no IG-bond CFD).

CANARY universe (SPY,VWO,VEA,BNDX) ported to SP500.DWX (SPY), AUDUSD.DWX (VWO EM proxy -- FLAGGED), GDAXI.DWX (VEA dev-ex-US proxy -- FLAGGED), USDJPY.DWX (BNDX global-bond proxy -- FLAGGED, no DWX bond CFD). The canary leg is the crash-protection trigger: any canary with 13612W < 0 forces the model fully risk-off. Because the bond canary BNDX has no clean DWX proxy, the canary is FLAGGED as approximated; the JPY safe-haven cross is the nearest defensive-FX stand-in.

DEFENSIVE universe (TIP,DBC,BIL,IEF,TLT,LQD,BND) has NO clean DWX bond/TIPS/cash proxy. Approximated and FLAGGED with the safest available DWX legs: XAUUSD.DWX (gold safe-haven, stands for the TIPS/duration sleeve), USDJPY.DWX (defensive FX), XTIUSD.DWX (real-asset DBC). Risk-off holds the top-N of these defensive proxies by 13612W. BIL (cash floor) cannot be represented (no cash instrument in MT5) -- the defensive-absolute-momentum BIL replacement degrades to 'flat/no-position' when no defensive proxy clears zero momentum.

Each EA instance runs one host symbol; the host opens/holds a long ONLY when it is in the currently-selected top-N (offensive set in risk-on, defensive set in risk-off). One position per magic on the host. Monthly equal-weight rebalance: top-6 offensive in risk-on, top-3 defensive in risk-off (BAA-G12 source weights). SP500.DWX is a backtest-only read member (not broker-routable for live).
